title: Discover stories and open an article from the homepage
description: Verifies a visitor can load the homepage, view featured and trending sections, browse the latest list, and open a story to reach a readable article detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the featured hero section
Scroll to the trending stories section
Scroll to the latest stories list
Click a story card from the latest list
Verify an article detail view is displayed with readable story content

title: Open a story from the featured hero
description: Verifies a visitor can open the featured hero story and read its detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the featured hero story
Verify an article detail view is displayed with readable story content

title: Continue browsing after reading an article
description: Verifies a visitor can open an article from the homepage, return to the homepage via in-app navigation, and continue browsing stories.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a story card from the trending section
Click the in-app navigation to return to the home landing
Scroll to the latest stories list
Verify the latest stories list is displayed for continued browsing

title: Paginate the latest stories list
description: Verifies a visitor can move between pages of the latest stories list and see the list update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the latest stories list
Navigate to the next page of the latest stories list
Navigate back to the previous page of the latest stories list
Verify the latest stories list is displayed after pagination changes

title: Compare multiple stories and keep browsing stable
description: Verifies a visitor can open multiple stories from the homepage, return between them using in-app navigation, and still browse lists without breaking.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a story card from the latest stories list
Click the in-app navigation to return to the home landing
Click a different story card from the trending section
Click the in-app navigation to return to the home landing
Verify featured, trending, and latest sections are displayed and usable

title: Newly created article is discoverable and readable from public browsing
description: Verifies an admin-created article can be discovered from the homepage lists and opened to a readable article detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/editor
Fill "New Public Article" into the title field
Fill "new-public-article" into the slug field
Select a category
Fill "Excerpt for public discovery" into the excerpt field
Fill "Content for public discovery" into the content field
Upload a valid image file in the cover image field
Submit the article form
Click the in-app navigation to go to the home landing
Scroll to the latest stories list
Click the story card for "New Public Article"
Verify the article detail view is displayed for the newly created article

title: Submit a new article with all required fields and cover image
description: Verifies an admin can complete the editor form including a cover image and submit successfully to see a saved confirmation state.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/editor
Fill "Test Article Title" into the title field
Fill "test-article-slug" into the slug field
Select a category
Fill "Test excerpt" into the excerpt field
Fill "Test content body" into the content field
Upload a valid image file in the cover image field
Submit the article form
Verify a saved or published confirmation state is visible

title: Navigate to About and Contact pages
description: Verifies a visitor can reach the About and Contact pages and see their main content render.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link to the About page
Click the in-app navigation link to the Contact page
Verify the contact page main content is displayed

title: Correct a missing slug and submit successfully
description: Verifies an admin can fix a missing slug after validation and submit successfully to reach a saved confirmation state.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/editor
Fill "Fix Slug Then Submit" into the title field
Leave the slug field empty
Submit the article form
Fill "fix-slug-then-submit" into the slug field
Select a category
Fill "Excerpt" into the excerpt field
Fill "Content" into the content field
Upload a valid image file in the cover image field
Submit the article form
Verify a saved or published confirmation state is visible

title: Block submission when slug is missing
description: Verifies the editor prevents submission when the slug is empty and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/editor
Fill "Title Without Slug" into the title field
Leave the slug field empty
Submit the article form
Verify a slug required validation error is visible
